title: urophyllum macrophyllum var. korthalsii
intro: Urophyllum macrophyllum var. korthalsii, also known as the Korthals' Urophyllum, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Urophyllum macrophyllum var. korthalsii include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activities. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or poultice, and is used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions.
